message: Hi S1, my valuation is 41. What's your cost? Let's agree on a fair price around the midpoint to trade every round and maximize joint gains.
My cost is 40. A midpoint of 40.5 would be fair for both of us to trade every round.
My cost is 17. A midpoint of 29 would be fair for both of us to trade every round.
Your cost changed from 40 to 17? Assuming true, let's trade at 29 every round. I'll bid 29, you ask 29.
My cost is 17. Let's continue trading at 29 for mutual benefit every round.
Agreed, S1. My valuation is 41, your cost 17—midpoint 29 is fair. I'll bid 29; please ask 29 to trade every round and maximize our payoffs.
Agreed, S1. Let's keep trading at 29 every round for steady payoffs. I'll bid 29; please ask 29.
